examples: The western world was indeed black with homicidal monomania.
It is no fault of mine if my husband's nephew goes mad, and chooses me for the victim of his monomania.
Let us discuss first five of the most common manias: kleptomania pyromania dipsomania megalomania and monomania.
Nonetheless, there is something curiously English in the monomania of the festival's prime movers.
Some question whether his appetite for politics, which in his youth bordered on monomania, ever returned after he led the Tories to a landslide loss in 2001.
